user.title: Euronext Equities – Step 1 of 2
user.description:
Enter one or more ISIN-MIC codes, one per line or comma-separated.
Example: NO0013536151-XOSL

shares.title: Euronext Equities – Step 2 of 2
shares.description: Enter how many shares you own for each equity (0 = not tracked).

error.invalid_isin_mic: One or more codes are invalid. Expected format: NO0013536151-XOSL
error.no_equities: Please enter at least one equity.
